name: Spinach Pie (Spanakopeta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach and chop very fine. (3 10 oz bags may be used in place of loose spinach).
2. Sprinkle spinach with 1 tablespoon salt and allow to stand 15 minutes.
3. Squeeze spinach to remove excess moisture. (This is an important step in making a good filling).
4. Combine the spinach with cheese, onion, eggs, olive oil, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Arrange 9 filo sheets, brushed separately with butter, in a greased pan (10 x 15").
6. Cover with spinach filling.
7. Cover with 6 more filo sheets, each brushed with melted butter.
8. Seal the edges to retain the filling.
9. Brush the top with melted butter.
10. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
